heading: Required disclosures to State boxing commissions by sanctioning organizations
label: 6307d Required disclosures to State boxing commissions by sanctioning organizations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 20 and is classified to .section 12 of Pub. L. 104–272section 6311 of this title

children.text: all charges, fees, and costs the organization will assess any boxer participating in that match;
all payments, benefits, complimentary benefits, and fees the organization will receive for its affiliation with the event, from the promoter, host of the event, and all other sources; and
such additional information as the commission may require.
